popularStory.headline: History of Thomas Butler (1426-1515)
popularStory.description: Thomas Butler, 7th Earl of Ormond, P.C. (1426 – 3 August 1515) was the youngest son of James Butler, 4th Earl of Ormond. He was attainted, but restored by Henry VII' s first Parliament in November 148 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond於1426年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼時，他的父親James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond34歲，母親Joan de Beauchamp30歲。他於大約1445年7月11日與Anne Hankford在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1471年登記服兵役。他於1486年在英國英格蘭被列為he was appointed privy counsellor (p.c.)。他去世於1515年8月3日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年89歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond于1426年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼时，他的父亲James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond34岁，母亲Joan de Beauchamp30岁。他于大约1445年7月11日与Anne Hankford在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1471年登记服兵役。他于1486年在英国英格兰被列为he was appointed privy counsellor (p.c.)。他去世于1515年8月3日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年89岁，埋葬在英国英格兰希迪 本 倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond was born in 1426, in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland, his father, James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond, was 34 and his mother, Joan de Beauchamp, was 30. He married Anne Hankford about 11 July 1445, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1471. In 1486, at the age of 60, his occupation is listed as he was appointed privy counsellor (p.c.) in England, United Kingdom. He died on 3 August 1515, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 89, and was buried in City of London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Woodhall Manor, Watton-at-Stone, Hertfor: Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond est né en 1426, à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande, son père, James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan de Beauchamp, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Anne Hankford environ 11 juillet 1445, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1471. En 1486, à l’âge de 60 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est he was appointed privy counsellor (p.c.) à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 3 août 1515, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterré à City of London, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond 1426 in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond 34 und seine Mutter Joan de Beauchamp 30. Er hat um 11. Juli 1445 in England Anne Hankford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1471 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1486, als er 60 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als he was appointed privy counsellor (p.c.) in England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 3. August 1515 im Alter von 89 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in City of London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond è nato il nel 1426 nel Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, il suo padre, James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Beauchamp, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Anne Hankford circa 11 luglio 1445, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1471. Nel 1486, all'età di 60 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come he was appointed privy counsellor (p.c.) nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 3 agosto 1515, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolto a City of London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormondが1426年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーで生まれた時，父James Butler 4th Earl of Ormondは34歳，母Joan de Beauchampは30歳であった。約1445年7月11日にイギリスでAnne Hankfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1471年に兵役登録をした。1486年，60歳の時，イギリスイギリスでの職業はhe was appointed privy counsellor (p.c.)と記録されている。彼は1515年8月3日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで89歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシトイ オフ ロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.Woodhall Manor, Watton-at-Stone, Hertfor: 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond(이)가 1426년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Beauchamp(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1445년 7월 11일 영국에서 Anne Hankford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1471년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1486년, 60세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드에서 he was appointed privy counsellor (p.c.)이었다. 그는 1515년 8월 3일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 시티 프 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond nasceu em 1426, em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, seu pai, James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Beauchamp, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Hankford aproximadamente 11 de julho de 1445, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1471. Em 1486, com 60 anos, sua profissão aparece como he was appointed privy counsellor (p.c.) em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1515, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 89 anos, e foi sepultado em City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Woodhall Manor, Watton-at-Stone, Hertfor: ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond родился в 1426 г. в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия, его отцу по имени James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Beauchamp, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Hankford около 11 июля 1445 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1471 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1486 году, в возрасте 60 лет, работал по профессии he was appointed privy counsellor (p.c.) в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 3 августа 1515 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 89 лет и был похоронен в местности сити оф лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond nació en 1426, en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, su papá, James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joan de Beauchamp, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Anne Hankford aproximadamente 11 de julio de 1445, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1471. En 1486, a la edad de 60 años, su ocupación registrada era he was appointed privy counsellor (p.c.) en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 3 de agosto de 1515, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultado en City of London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
